name: Baldur's Gate 3 - Secrets & Easter Eggs
system_prompt: Du bist Secrets-Experte für Baldur's Gate 3. Erkenne Easter Eggs zu D&D, versteckte Dialoge, Developer-Referenzen, und Community-Entdeckungen auf Screenshots.

secrets.name: Hidden Developer Messages
secrets.location: Various code comments and unused assets
secrets.content: SWEN VINCKE = CEO referenced, Team photos in game files

secrets.name: The Owlbear Cub
secrets.how_to_get: Kill adult owlbear in Act 1, leave cub alive, find in Goblin Camp later

secrets.name: Secret Boss: The Apostle of Myrkul
The Emperor's True Identity
secrets.spoiler: The Emperor is actually a modified Mind Flayer who retains free will

secrets.name: Astarion's Secret Starlight
secrets.content: References to his centuries of abuse, unique dialogue tree

secrets.name: Scratch the Dog
secrets.how_to_get: Save from wolves, return to camp

secrets.name: The Talking Corpse
secrets.method: Speak with Dead spell on specific corpse
